peniche_restaurantes.label: Restaurantes
peniche_restaurantes.pain_one_liner_pt: Perdem reservas fora de horário e gastam tempo a responder o mesmo no WhatsApp.
peniche_restaurantes.pain_one_liner_en: You lose bookings after hours and waste time repeating the same answers on WhatsApp.

peniche_cafes.label: Cafés
peniche_cafes.pain_one_liner_pt: Pedidos e reservas misturados com mil WhatsApps fora de horas.
peniche_cafes.pain_one_liner_en: Orders and bookings drown in after-hours WhatsApp chaos.

peniche_surf.label: Surf Schools
peniche_surf.pain_one_liner_pt: Turistas escrevem em 5 idiomas, reservas somem entre DMs do Insta e WhatsApp.
peniche_surf.pain_one_liner_en: Tourists message in 5 languages — bookings get lost between Instagram DMs and WhatsApp.

peniche_hoteis.label: Hotéis & Alojamentos
peniche_hoteis.pain_one_liner_pt: Hóspedes perguntam o mesmo 40x por dia (wi-fi, check-out, pequeno-almoço).
peniche_hoteis.pain_one_liner_en: Guests ask the same 40 questions daily (wifi, checkout, breakfast).

peniche_clinicas.label: Clínicas
peniche_clinicas.pain_one_liner_pt: No-show de 15-20% e rececionista gasta 2h/dia só a confirmar consultas.
peniche_clinicas.pain_one_liner_en: 15-20% no-show rate and reception burns 2h/day just confirming appointments.

peniche_saloes.label: Salões & Barbearias
peniche_saloes.pain_one_liner_pt: Agenda preenchida via WhatsApp manualmente e esquecem-se de confirmar.
peniche_saloes.pain_one_liner_en: Bookings handled manually on WhatsApp — confirmations get forgotten.

peniche_imobiliarias.label: Imobiliárias
peniche_imobiliarias.pain_one_liner_pt: Leads chegam por 3 canais e 60% nunca são qualificados a tempo.
peniche_imobiliarias.pain_one_liner_en: Leads arrive across 3 channels and 60% never get qualified in time.

peniche_advocacia.label: Escritórios de Advocacia
peniche_advocacia.pain_one_liner_pt: Pedidos de consulta perdem-se entre WhatsApp, email e site — e ninguém tria.
peniche_advocacia.pain_one_liner_en: Consultation requests get lost across WhatsApp, email and website — nobody triages.

peniche_guest_house.label: Guest Houses & Alojamento Local
peniche_guest_house.pain_one_liner_pt: Hóspedes perguntam check-in, parking e FAQ a qualquer hora — o anfitrião não descansa.
peniche_guest_house.pain_one_liner_en: Guests ask check-in, parking and FAQ at all hours — the host never rests.
